title: Nursery Rhyme. XX. Historical
content:
High ding a ding, and ho ding a ding,
        The parliament soldiers are gone to the king;
        Some with new beavers, some with new bands,
        The parliament soldiers are all to be hang'd.
meaning:
"Nursery Rhyme. XX. Historical" is a quintessential example of Unknown's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
